reach_why: Recursive evaluator failure and Goodhart-like drift are already widely discussed; this mainly sharpens an existing concern.
novelty_why: It non-obviously links self-improvement, truth-evaluation bugs, taboo-triggering language, and semantic oddity under fallibilist error amplification.
falsifiable_why: Test by constructing self-improvers with evaluator bugs and checking whether iteration amplifies mismeasurement rather than correcting it.
explanation: Self-improvement can optimize evaluator flaws, causing confident drift away from truth despite fluent, seemingly creative performance.
